description: You are a freelance writer preparing an article about digital privacy tools. Compile an annotated bibliography of key privacy organizations based on the following websites: https://www.eff.org/issues/anonymity, https://www.torproject.org/about/history/, https://freedom.press/, and https://privacyguides.org/en/. The bibliography must include the URL, the page title, the organization name (e.g., Electronic Frontier Foundation, The Tor Project, Freedom of the Press Foundation, Privacy Guides), and a 1-2 sentence description of the page's focus for each source. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/privacy_research_bibliography.txt using '## Source [Number]' headings for each entry.
